---
title: "Projects"
---

::: {.content}

## Research Projects

::: {.card}
### GBSO Symposium
A comprehensive presentation on cutting-edge research in biological sciences and bioinformatics applications.

**Event:** Graduate Biomedical Sciences Organization (GBSO) Symposium  
**Institution:** University of Alabama at Birmingham

[View Details →](projects/gbso-symposium.qmd)
:::

<!-- Add more project cards here as needed -->

<button class="theme-toggle" onclick="toggleTheme()">
  <i class="fas fa-sun"></i>
  <i class="fas fa-moon"></i>
</button>

<script>
function toggleTheme() {
  document.body.classList.toggle('dark-mode');
}
</script>

<script src="https://kit.fontawesome.com/a076d05399.js" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
:::
